name: dominion_playwright
description: BGE and Water portal automation for The Dominion Group

scripts.bge:audit: cross-env BGE_MODE=audit HEADLESS=false npx playwright test tests/bge.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.bge:paperless: cross-env BGE_MODE=paperless npx playwright test tests/bge.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.bge:bills: cross-env BGE_MODE=bills npx playwright test tests/bge.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.bge:full: cross-env BGE_MODE=full npx playwright test tests/bge.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.water:audit: cross-env WATER_MODE=audit HEADLESS=false npx playwright test tests/water.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.water:paperless: cross-env WATER_MODE=paperless npx playwright test tests/water.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.water:bills: cross-env WATER_MODE=bills npx playwright test tests/water.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.water:full: cross-env WATER_MODE=full npx playwright test tests/water.spec.ts --project=chromium

author: The Dominion Group
